draft_reply.body:
Hi Yihui,

Thanks for getting in touch. I would love to learn more about your AI story app demo and share our partnership packages and rate card.

original_email.body:
Hello! Thanks for getting in touch via X

I’m looping in my client service manager Asher to share rates and business
partner Sam Levin.

Asher/Sam this is a forwarded message from my X so you can have context of
his ask.

“Hey! I’m Yihui from AD&OG.

*We’re working with a new interactive AI story app where users can shape
their own storylines, build relationships with characters, and explore
different story outcomes based on their choices.*

*I came across your content and thought your style could be a really nice
fit for this kind of campaign. Would you be open to hearing more about a
possible collaboration?*

*If yes, feel free to share your rates or rate card, and I’ll send over
more details. 😊”*

Take it from here! All the best!

Robert Scoble

-- 
Robert Scoble
Founder, Unaligned (media company about how AI is bringing us new things)
Mobile: +1-425-205-1921
X: https://x.com/scobleizer
Web: https://unaligned.io
This message copyright the sender. All rights reserved.

Hello!  

 Thank you so much for the email, I’m sending over our rates via a PDF in this email.

email_thread.body:
Hi all，

Hope you’re doing well!

My name is Evie, and I’m part of the marketing team at Instory.

Looking forward to your reply!

Best,
Evie

What are you looking to promote? 

Can you give me the name of the company, or product that you are interested in sharing and which Tier on our sponsorship works best for you?

email_thread.subject: Re: AD&OG Collaboration and Rate

email_thread.body:
Hi Asher,

Sorry for the late reply~

This is the official website of the product:
https://inplay.art/en/

If you'd like to learn more about the product, please feel free to ask me any questions.

We're interested in collaborating with you on an Custom X Post for this product. 

I wanted to check whether you have availability on June 24. If not, please let me know your available dates and we can discuss further.

Also, could you share your preferred contact information (such as email, Discord, Telegram, or WhatsApp) for easier communication?

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Evie

email_thread.subject: Re: Re: AD&OG Collaboration and Rate

email_thread.body:
Hi Evie,

No worries on the timing, and thanks for sharing the link. Happy to take a look at inplay.art.
Email is the best way to reach us, so let us keep everything on this thread and we will stay quick and responsive here.

For a Custom X Post, the rate is $1,995. That is a custom written X post crafted specifically for Robert's audience.
June 24 works on our end, with one condition: for new collaborations we collect payment in full before anything goes live, so the 24th is good as long as payment is completed before the posting date.

To get the invoice over to you, could you send your invoicing details (company or billing name, billing address, and any PO or reference number you need on the invoice). Once we have that we will send the invoice, and we will lock in the 24th as soon as payment is in.

Looking forward to working with you.

All the best,
Asher

-----------------------------------
Asher Weisberger
Client Services Manager
Unaligned
AlignedNews.com
https://unaligned.io
https://x.com/unalignedX
-------------------------------------

email_thread.body:
Hi Asher,

Sorry for the late reply~

This is the official website of the product:
https://inplay.art/en/

If you'd like to learn more about the product, please feel free to ask me any questions.

We're interested in collaborating with you on an Custom X Post for this product. 

I wanted to check whether you have availability on June 24. If not, please let me know your available dates and we can discuss further.

Also, could you share your preferred contact information (such as email, Discord, Telegram, or WhatsApp) for easier communication?

Looking forward to hearing from you.

Best regards,
Evie

email_thread.snippet: Hi Asher, Sorry for the late reply~ This is the official website of the product: https://inplay.art/en/ If you'd like to learn more about the product, please feel free to ask me any questions. We
email_thread.subject: Re: Re: AD&OG Collaboration and Rate

email_thread.body:
Hi Evie,

No worries on the timing, and thanks for sharing the link. Happy to take a look at inplay.art.
Email is the best way to reach us, so let us keep everything on this thread and we will stay quick and responsive here.

For a Custom X Post, the rate is $1,995. That is a custom written X post crafted specifically for Robert's audience.
June 24 works on our end, with one condition: for new collaborations we collect payment in full before anything goes live, so the 24th is good as long as payment is completed before the posting date.

To get the invoice over to you, could you send your invoicing details (company or billing name, billing address, and any PO or reference number you need on the invoice). Once we have that we will send the invoice, and we will lock in the 24th as soon as payment is in.

Looking forward to working with you.

All the best,
Asher

-----------------------------------
Asher Weisberger
Client Services Manager
Unaligned
AlignedNews.com
https://unaligned.io
https://x.com/unalignedX

email_thread.body:
Hello,

Hi! Thanks for sending over the invoice.

After discussing it with my manager, may I proceed with 50% upfront to confirm the collaborationf?

With the remaining 50% to be paid after the content has been delivered and approved.

We'll arrange the first payment these two days. 

May I know Robert's idea about the Inplay post? That's will help us to prepare the assets if Robert needed

Thanks for your understanding, and we're looking forward to working with you!

email_thread.snippet: Hello, Hi! Thanks for sending over the invoice. After discussing it with my manager, may I proceed with 50% upfront to confirm the collaborationf? With the remaining 50% to be paid after the content
email_thread.subject: Re: Re: AD&OG Collaboration and Rate

email_thread.body:
Thanks for the note, and for moving this forward.

I have to be straight with you on one thing: we cannot do a split or partial payment. New collaborations are paid in full, 100 percent upfront, before any content goes live. That is a firm policy across every partner, not something specific to this deal. Robert does not post first and get paid later, so a 50 now and 50 after delivery structure will not work on our side.

The good news is that once the full invoice is settled we move fast. Send it through when you are ready and we will lock Robert in and start the asset prep right away.

On the Inplay post: as soon as payment is in, I will align Robert on the angle and send over his direction plus any talking points, so your team can prepare the assets in parallel.

Appreciate your understanding, and we are looking forward to working with you.

Best,
Asher

-----------------------------------
Asher Weisberger
Client Services Manager
Unaligned
AlignedNews.com
https://unaligned.io
https://x.com/unalignedX
-------------------------------------
